_comment_top: R6 Wave 7c — seed row for the KnowledgeRetrievalHandler 'SearchKnowledgeBase' method. Replaces the second of the two legacy hardcoded LLM functions previously registered on KnowledgeRetrievalTools (removed from SprkChatAgentFactory.ResolveTools).
_comment_routing: Runtime invocation routes to the C# class via sprk_handlerclass = 'KnowledgeRetrievalHandler'. The handler reads sprk_configuration.method = 'SearchKnowledgeBase' to dispatch to the semantic-search pipeline.
_comment_method_dispatch: Two rows (KNOWLEDGE-SOURCE-GET / KNOWLEDGE-BASE-SEARCH) share one handler class — same pattern as TextRefinementHandler (Wave 7 Q9). Each row's sprk_configuration.method discriminator selects the internal method.
_comment_design: Capability gate: NOT set — KnowledgeRetrieval was always-available pre-Wave-7b and remains so. Leave sprk_requiredcapability null (default).
_comment_scope: When the chat session is bound to a playbook with knowledge sources, ChatInvocationContext.KnowledgeScope.RagKnowledgeSourceIds is forwarded by SprkChatAgentFactory and the handler uses it as a search-time filter. Standalone chat (no playbook) searches across all tenant sources.
_comment_consumption: Read by scripts/Seed-TypedHandlers.ps1. Idempotent — script queries by sprk_handlerclass + sprk_toolcode + sprk_name 'SYS-%' filter; UPSERTs.
sprk_description: Search the knowledge base for reference information relevant to the query. Use this to find policies, procedures, standards, or reference materials that apply to the user's question. Results are scoped to the playbook's knowledge sources when a playbook is bound, or across all tenant sources otherwise. Returns ranked results with citation markers.
_comment_availableincontexts: 100000002 = Both (Playbook + Chat). FR-12 acceptance: invocable from both playbook orchestration and chat-driven function calling.

sprk_jsonschema.title: KnowledgeRetrievalHandler.SearchKnowledgeBase Request
sprk_jsonschema.description: Argument shape for chat-driven invocation of the SearchKnowledgeBase method. The 'query' is the search text; optional 'topK' caps the number of results returned.

query.description: Search query text. Hybrid semantic + vector + keyword search is applied; results are ranked by combined relevance.

topK.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 5 if omitted; clamped to [1, 20].

sprk_configuration._comment: method = 'SearchKnowledgeBase' is the dispatch discriminator. This row exposes only the semantic-search method.
